CustomField.formula: IF(VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c))<=1, VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)), If( ISPICKVAL(Listing_Stage__c , 'Reduced bedroom/household size restricted'), VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c))-1, If( ISPICKVAL(Listing_Stage__c , 'Open Listing'), 1,VALUE(TEXT(HOMEtracker__Number_of_Bedrooms__c)))))
CustomField.label: Min Household Size
